creator: nobutaka@nobutaka.com
text:
This is update of graphics/gimp1-i18n from 1.1.5 to 1.1.6.
Please apply following patch to current port. The patch is
compressed because of its size(139KB).

Added files:  gimp1-i18n/patches/patch-bb
                                 patch-bc
                                 patch-bd

Removed file: gimp1-i18n/patches/patch-aq
